# Security Policy

See [`/SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md) at the repository root for the full
policy (PT-BR + EN).

## Quick reference

- **Do not** open public issues with exploit details.
- Report privately via email: `iohanlucasf19@gmail.com`
  (subject: `[SECURITY] api-extractor`), or open a GitHub issue tagged
  `security` describing the problem in general terms.
- Acknowledgement within 7 days. Triage within 30 days.
